answers: Start woodworking: learn basic joinery, invest in a few quality tools (saw, chisel, drill, measuring tape), and start with small projects.
Essential tools: hand saw or circular saw, drill, chisels, clamps, measuring tape, sandpaper, and workbench.
Beginner projects: cutting board, shelf, picture frame, planter box, birdhouse. Simple joints, big satisfaction.
Woodworking tips: measure twice cut once, sand with the grain, use sharp tools (safer than dull ones), and wear safety glasses.
